envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Recommendations are PROPOSED_NOT_APPROVED. Admin approval at D4 mandatory.

items.name: Org / Relationship Map Recommendation
items.description: Ranks proposed role-shaped relationship regions (approval chains / escalation paths / executive-support relationships / dotted-line relationships) consumed from the Org / Relationship Map Assessment.
items.human_readable_summary: Proposes which approval + escalation + reporting relationships admins should approve. Role-shaped only — never named-individual surveillance.
items.model_usage_notes: Approval chains rank first because they gate every downstream write authority. Escalation paths rank second. Dotted-line relationships rank lower because they vary more across orgs.

ranked_regions.rationale_summary: Approval chains gate every downstream write authority. Admin approval required.
Escalation paths govern incident + customer + compliance + legal flow.
EA / Chief of Staff / Office of CEO relationships govern delegated executive authority.
Matrixed reporting varies across orgs; rank lower until admin confirms.

items.rationale: Approval + escalation gate write authority + incident flow. They must land before any tool-write or workflow-execution region activates downstream. Confidential relationships excluded at assessment intake remain absolute.
cross_map_dependencies: Authority Map depends on Org Map approval chains
Workflow Map depends on Org Map escalation paths
Role Map depends on Org Map for reporting-structure context
items.approval_gate_required: Admin policy approval at D4 per ADR-0082 Amendment 1.
DMW_scope_implications: Org Map bounds Team / Hive-scoped DMW memory
Confidential relationships excluded at assessment remain excluded at DMW activation
Approval-path relationships inform Authority Map DMW scope downstream
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every Org Map region before any downstream activation
No workforce-scoring inferences from reporting structure
No managerial-oversight monitoring from approval chains
